Maintain a compact working world model of what the current level seems to contain, what actions appear to do, what the goal seems to be, what is still uncertain, and what plan currently looks best.

sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state - both bars are at 14
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ('N', 'Y') and n['pixels'] <= 20:
        print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check red cross patterns - maybe they need to be clicked
print("\nRed cross patterns:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'r':
        print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check gray shapes near bars
print("\nGray shapes near bars:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] <= 10:
        print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
